name: dgmo-mcp
description: Generate sequence, flowchart, ER, C4, gantt + 35 other diagrams from text — render locally to SVG/PNG, then hand off to the Diagrammo editor
long_description: MCP server for rendering DGMO diagrams. Generate sequence diagrams, flowcharts, ER diagrams, C4 architecture, gantt charts, kanban, sitemaps, mind maps, and 35+ other chart types from concise text markup. Outputs SVG or PNG, can open diagrams in the local Diagrammo desktop app, generate shareable diagrammo.app URLs, and produce polished multi-section HTML reports. All rendering is local — no diagram data leaves your machine.

tools.name: render_diagram
tools.description: Render DGMO markup to SVG or PNG

tools.name: open_in_app
tools.description: Open diagram in Diagrammo desktop app (falls back to browser)

tools.name: preview_diagram
tools.description: Render diagrams and open an HTML preview in the browser

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generate a polished HTML report with multiple diagrams
